title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate embeddings, pull & list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, installable via npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package adding Ollama chat & embedding support to LangChain.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI); chat, model management, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper that adds history, themes, and shortcuts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like pair programmer.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama + Sentence-Transformers.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Community n8n node that adds Ollama chat & generate operations to no-code workflows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial but actively maintained Rust crate for chatting with Ollama.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama on NuGet with both sync & async APIs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made docker-compose stacks bundling Ollama, Open WebUI, Postgres, Qdrant & nginx.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you run local LLM prompts inside your notes using Ollama.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack bot that answers channel mentions with any Ollama model.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Official experimental Discord bot repo for Ollama (slash-commands, threads, streaming).

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama’s HTTP API with GenServer-friendly callbacks.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All-chat now offers an Ollama-bridge option to serve its models through Ollama endpoints.
